The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Norman G. Fernandez, Esq. (800-816-1529) appears telephonically as moving party/withdrawing counsel for plaintiffs, Scott and Salma Bounds

Attorney, Randall J. Lee of Walsworth WFBM LLP (415-781-7072 ext. 2830) appears as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party, Hotel Niko

No other appearance is made in this matter.

Court hears from counsel present. Attorney Norman Gregory Fernandez' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL for plaintiffs SCOTT BOUNDS and SALMA BOUNDS is GRANTED. Mr. Fernandez must submit a [proposed] written order, to be effective upon filing of proof of service, reflecting any and all future hearing dates, and reflecting the plaintiffs' contact information. Mr. Lee, counsel for defendant shall provide information regarding arbitration and related deadlines to the plaintiffs.
